sizing_rule.note: Do not compute position sizing metrics or adjust positions until minimum 30 closed trades completed. Requires Z-score analysis of trade streaks to confirm non-random dependency before applying optimal f or other Kelly-based sizing. Parameters not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Require a minimum of 30 closed trades before computing position sizing metrics and assessing trade dependency to determine if a trading system has non-random characteristics that warrant position adjustment.
